Created attachment 177324
1.11.21 v2

Bump to the latest upstream release. Update dependencies to follow the
upstream requirements: devel/py-botocore should be at least 1.4.78, and
devel/py-yaml at least 3.10.

portlint: OK (-C, looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere, 11.0-R, 10.[123]-R, 9.3-R, amd64/i386, default options)
